All Return Types Covered

One firm. Every tax situation. Every form.

Individual Returns (1040)

NRI & Foreign Income

FBAR, FATCA, Form 2555, Form 1116 — complex international filing.

Prior-Year & Amended

Catch up on unfiled years or correct previous returns risk-free.

FAQ

Tax Filing FAQs

Common questions about US tax preparation and filing.

You will need your W-2 or 1099 forms, Social Security numbers for all family members, last year's tax return, bank account details for direct deposit, receipts for deductions (mortgage interest, charitable donations, business expenses), and any foreign income documentation.
We offer flat-fee pricing based on return complexity. Individual 1040 returns start from $149. Business returns and complex multi-state filings vary. Your free consultation includes an upfront quote with no hidden fees.
Yes — NRI tax filing is one of our specializations. We handle Indian salary income, rental income, capital gains, DTAA (Double Tax Avoidance Agreement) benefits, FBAR for foreign bank accounts, and FATCA compliance.
The standard IRS filing deadline is April 15. An automatic 6-month extension to October 15 is available by filing Form 4868. However, taxes owed are still due by April 15 — an extension only extends the filing deadline, not payment.
Yes. All returns we prepare come with year-round IRS audit support at no extra charge. Our IRS-enrolled agents can represent you directly before the IRS in case of an audit.
Absolutely. We file in all 50 states. If you lived or worked in multiple states during the year, we handle all resident and non-resident state returns simultaneously.
